about.headline_html:
Building Healthy, Beautiful Homes
Through the Passionate Pursuit of Craft
paragraphs: For more than three decades, Horizon Pacific Contracting has been building and renovating extraordinary residences across Victoria, BC. We employ dedicated full-time construction crews to ensure every project has one site supervisor and crew from start to finish.
We build to the highest sustainability standards, including Built Green, LEED Platinum, Net Zero, and Passive House certifications, with a focus on minimizing waste through upcycling and unbuilding.
Great communication and meticulous attention to detail define how we work. Every home we build is delivered on time, on budget, and crafted to stand the test of time.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We meet to understand your vision, budget, and timeline for the project.

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: Detailed plans and specifications developed with your design team and our build expertise.

process.title: Construction
process.description: One dedicated site supervisor and crew from start to finish, with transparent communication throughout.

process.title: Completion
process.description: Final walkthrough, quality assurance, and handover of your finished home.

testimonial.quote: We're overjoyed with the beautiful custom home. The awe our guests express is a tribute to Horizon's execution.
testimonial.author: Allison Bruce-Fowler
testimonial.title: Homeowner

contact.subtitle: Whether you're envisioning a new custom home, a heritage restoration, or a transformative renovation, we'd love to hear about your project.

footer.description: Horizon Pacific Contracting is an award-winning custom home builder and renovation firm serving Greater Victoria for over 30 years. Built Green, LEED Platinum, and Passive House certified.
